kiosk.Title: Digital Magazine Coming Soon
kiosk.Summary: Updates coming soon. We're working on various digital publications and the systems that work with them.
kiosk.docDescription: Once available, users will be able to Tap & Hold this button to launch the document. This messages will update once the document is published by the developer or author.
Facts: The Advertising Guide has not been published yet. Check back later for updates.
Once published, the Advertising Guide will help you understand in-app options for promos and advertisements.
The Red Mobile has no intentions of 3rd party advertising platforms. Instead, we offer exclusive access for advertising only to locals and relative entities.
